title: Unstructured error — string message only, no machine-parseable code
expected_feedback: Critical: Error response has only a human-readable message — no machine-parseable error code. Clients must string-match on 'message' to determine the error type, which breaks when wording changes. Every error response needs a stable 'code' field (e.g., 'validation_error', 'not_found') that clients can switch on programmatically. The message should complement the code, not replace it. Full envelope: {error: {code: 'validation_error', message: '...', details: [...], trace_id: '...'}}.
violated_rule: Error model is consistent and machine-parseable
